policy: Only missing official downloads that materially improve the current reference slice are downloaded. Older archive material stays manifest-only until a claim or evaluation scenario requires it.

decisions.rationale: Do not download for the text-first knowledge base unless a transcript or voice-demo evaluation requires it.
